description_long: This hotel complex features a symmetrical layout with multiple bungalow-style units arranged in two rows, each separated by narrow blue water channels. At the center of the property is a large rectangular swimming pool, flanked by manicured lawns and pathways. The main building, which likely serves as the reception and common area, is situated at the far end of the pool and is accompanied by a secondary structure, possibly a restaurant or lounge, with a pitched roof and wooden accents. The grounds are enclosed by a brick perimeter wall and lined with evenly spaced palm trees, giving the property a resort-like ambiance. Additional landscaped areas and a tall, slender tower or chimney are present on one side, while the opposite side features open green space and a smaller building. The overall design emphasizes open space, water features, and a blend of modern and tropical architectural elements.
description: A resort-style hotel complex with rows of bungalow units, a central pool, landscaped grounds, and modern-tropical architecture.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the symmetrical layout of bungalow units, central pool, and main building at the rear, with palm trees lining the perimeter.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side perspective of the bungalow rows, water channels, and the open green space adjacent to the main complex.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the hotel from the opposite end, focusing on the pool, main building, and the secondary structure with a pitched roof.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a lateral view, emphasizing the length of the bungalow rows, water features, and the landscaped areas on both sides.
